query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT ts.id) as training_sets_created,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) as users_who_started_training,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as cycles_completed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.userId) as users_who_completed_cycles
FROM training_sets ts
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON ts.id = ch.trainingSetId;

  COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) as users_who_started_training,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as cycles_completed,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.userId) as users_who_completed_cycles
FROM training_sets ts
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON ts.id = ch.trainingSetId;
